items.title: Follow up after Barak's meeting with David @ US Bank on Tuesday
items.context: Email from barakp@opti.ai on May 10: 'BTW I'm meeting David @ US Bank on Tue Morning' — may surface customer interest or co-investment signal worth tracking.

items.title: Check in with Roy Katmor on new term sheets around May 20
items.context: Email from roy@orchid.security on May 6: 'We passed on a TS this week as the terms didn't align with our backers, but I'm expecting a few more to crop up in the coming weeks. Travel over the next two weeks will slow things down a bit.'

items.title: Follow up on Prism Layer seed deck expected this week
items.context: Email from simone@prismlayer.ai on May 8: 'You'll be first on the list for our seed deck, which we'll have finished next week.'

items.title: Monitor VanishID lead search progress and follow up on round terms
items.context: Email from matt@vanishid.com on May 4: Q1 FY27 hit $1.17M new ARR (148% of forecast), ending ARR $5.92M. Matt said 'I am focused on finding a lead and will keep you posted.' Insiders asked for 50%+ of round.

items.title: Check if Sentra and NextEra Energy connected after intro
items.context: Email thread from May 4: Fan made intro between ashwin.gopinath@sentra.app and Brian.Sykes@nexteraenergy.com. Brian replied but no confirmation of meeting scheduled yet.

items.title: Prep for Fin Capital & U.S. Bank Quarterly Leadership Call
items.context: Calendar event 'Fin Capital & U.S. Bank | Quarterly Leadership Call' on May 11 at 3:00 PM ET with 18+ attendees from US Bank leadership including Dominic Venturo, Meghan Kober, and others.
